name: E-Commerce Schema
description: Customer, Order, Product, and OrderItem entities for an e-commerce system

nodes.label: Customer
nodes.description:
id: UUID PK
name: VARCHAR
email: VARCHAR
address: TEXT
created_at: TIMESTAMP

nodes.label: Order
nodes.description:
id: UUID PK
customer_id: UUID FK
status: VARCHAR
total: DECIMAL
ordered_at: TIMESTAMP

nodes.label: Product
nodes.description:
id: UUID PK
name: VARCHAR
description: TEXT
price: DECIMAL
stock: INTEGER

nodes.label: OrderItem
nodes.description:
id: UUID PK
order_id: UUID FK
product_id: UUID FK
quantity: INTEGER
unit_price: DECIMAL
